entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408发布亮点：人工智能与技术创新（AI and Technologies）
entry.content:
人工智能与技术创新在优化业务流程，改进决策支持，提高用户体验方面发挥着关键作用。在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 版本中，人工智能和技术创新将带来众多令人期待的亮点功能，用于提升企业运营效率，改变企业应对复杂商业挑战的方式。

下面让我们看看具体内容。

SAP Joule in S/4HANA Cloud

SAP Joule（以下简称Joule）作为SAP产品的专属AI智能副驾（AI copilot），继在SAP SuccessFactors中发布之后，将在S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.1版本中全面提供使用。

通过新一代生成AI技术，Joule将会革新用户与SAP 业务系统的交互方式，帮助用户在每个业务接触点开展有效互动，更高效地执行日常任务，从而改变 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 的用户体验。

Joule可以帮助您：

  • 轻松导航到财务，销售，采购，专业服务等应用程序
  • 快速了解业务对象，例如采购订单,采购申请
  • 快速无缝地访问SAP的帮助门户文档信息，并以更清晰简洁的答案进行总结  

用户体验

本次发布引入了个性化用户界面“我的主页”、通过客户应用的使用习惯、地理位置或访问权限，智能推荐主页显示的应用程序，待办事项，预交付卡片等等，并在待办事项部分支持标准和扩展的情况管理提示，进而提升用户体验。

从订单到收款（Order to Cash）的端到端智能流程自动化功能

通过集成各种智能技术和应用程序，为客户打造全方位的端到端自动化，更好地管理订单到收款全流程，实现更加高效、透明和可追溯的业务运营。结合智能化的数据分析和实时监控，企业可以更加准确地把握业务状况，做出更加明智的决策，提高运营效率和盈利能力。

智能场景生命周期管理( ISLM)中的更新

ISLM 是 SAP S/4HANA 堆栈中用于高效集成和操作 AI 场景的统一入口点。它支持客户和合作伙伴管理和使用 SAP 的预构建 AI 场景，或者构建他们的自定义用例。ISLM 包含在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 的许可中，目前支持超过 25 个 SAP 预构建的智能应用场景。

新功能：一键开启（Turnkey）

在2408版本中ISLM将通过全新的一键开启（Turnkey）功能，进一步自动化AI场景的激活和管理步骤。有别于传统的机器学习开启流程，客户无需具备数据科学家和机器学习的复杂流程知识，通过打开Turnkey开关，即可自动激活用例，避免在初始激活和后续管理中的繁琐操作。此外，系统还可以监控Turnkey的运行状态及其他相关部件。这将大大降低S/4HANA Cloud中AI场景的使用门槛和激活成本。

新技术框架： ISLM 支持生成式 AI （Generative AI）用例

作为管理AI场景的应用程序，ISLM 将与SAP GenAI Hub支持的 LLM 模型无缝集成。客户可以探索使用开箱即用的生成式AI用例，或者选择适合的LLM模型来部署和激活生成式AI的自定义用例。这些智能场景将统一在 ISLM 中进行管理。

另外，2408版本中，ISLM 将提供基本的提示词管理（Prompt management)功能，用于创建、生成和扩展提示词模板。

情况管理（Situation Handling）

在SAP S/4HANA Cloud中，您可以通过使用情况处理来提高业务流程的质量和效率。情况处理可以自动监测和跟踪业务流程节点中发生的问题，需要注意的特殊情况，并通知正确的用户以采取进一步的措施。简而言之，一旦情况发生，用户应该了解情况，自动收到通知。并会获得如何解决问题的建议, 最终帮助业务用户更快地处理和清理这些问题。

新用例 (31N)

在专业服务（professional Service）中用于提醒项目结束日期已到，但阶段仍未完成的项目

SAP 帮助中的新用例清单

New Use Cases for Situation Handling | SAP Help Portal

使用自定义对象创建情况对象

在管理情况对象应用程序中，客户可以使用面向 Eclipse 的 ABAP 开发工具 (ADT)创建自定义SAP对象类型（SAP object types ）和SAP对象节点（SAP object node types ）来创建自定义的情况对象，进而扩展全新的通知场景。

管理情况对象应用程序中的内嵌文本翻译（built-in translation for texts）能将被弃用。

用户可以使用维护翻译(Maintain Translations)应用程序来翻译情况对象、情况场景和情况类型的文本。详情请访问帮助文档

Maintain Translations | SAP Help Portal

更多有关2408中发布功能亮点，请关注Bert Schulze 发表的2408重点发布 博客

或观看我们的 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 早期发布系列回放！

感谢阅读。

entry.title: Discover AI Innovations: Beta Testing AI Applications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
At SAP, we're dedicated to delivering the best possible experience for our customers. That's why we're inviting you to participate in our Beta Testing Program, where you can provide valuable feedback on new features and help us refine them before their official release.

By taking part in beta testing, you'll have the opportunity to explore the latest functionality before it's available to the wider customer base, and your input can directly impact the quality and usability of the features.

With SAP's continuous innovation in AI technology, we are excited to announce that our upcoming 2408 release will introduce a wide array of AI-related applications available for Beta testing. This provides you with an early opportunity to experience and engage with the latest innovations firsthand.

Finance

AI-Assisted Configuration for US Tax Jurisdictions

Utilize AI for extracting key information from natural language sentences or given Excel files, and automatically configure jurisdiction-based tax settings. This streamlines tax configuration processes, reduces manual errors, and enhances operational efficiency through natural language interaction and a more intuitive user interface, leading to a modernized and cost-effective onboarding experience.

Click to view the demo video

AI-Assisted Error Resolution

AFC's AI-Assisted Error Resolution effectively interprets technical error messages and context to provide understandable explanations and step-by-step resolution guides, saving time and preventing delays during the financial close process. It also empowers end-users to independently mitigate common error situations, reducing pressure and effort while modernizing the error resolution experience.

Click to view the demo video

AI-Assisted Financial Business Insights

Utilize a "Virtual Analyst" to provide instant explanation and summarization of insights in natural language and automate the discovery of significant data in Review Booklets for Cost Center. With AI, analyze and highlight data dependencies and suggest actionable insights presented in intuitive visualizations and plain language, facilitating management reporting and commentary.

Click to view the demo video

AI-assisted Explanation of Fixed Asset Depreciation Keys

Sales

Assisted Object Creation of Customer Return

Assisted Object Creation of Custom Returns feature utilizes AI to assist in the creation of return orders. The intelligent User Interface provides recommendations for recurring input values, ranked by probability, allowing the user to easily select from the offered recommendations, thereby streamlining the input process.

Project Management

Resource Management: Intelligent Matching of Employees to Projects

The feature of advanced skill match assists in finding skilled employees for resource requests. It considers similar skills to those requested and maintained in the candidate's profile, and presents a matching candidate list to the resource manager. This streamlines the process of finding the right candidates for resource requests.

User Experience

AI-Assisted Smart Summarization

Get summarizations for your object pages using SAP Fiori elements apps to facilitate decision making. Translate the summarization into languages other than your default language, and use it as a starting point for follow-ups. Easily share the summarization in your preferred solution and enjoy beta testing at no additional license cost.

AI-Assisted Easy Filter

Users can input filter criteria in natural language to obtain filter results in SAP Fiori elements-based list report applications. Verify the applied filter values in your classical filter experience and refine the filters as needed. Utilize the filtering experience that best suits your needs.

For more information, see: Get Involved Early

Register and experience the latest AI features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and influence upcoming AI developments.

entry.title: Professional Services in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Release
entry.content:
In this blog post I’d like to outline the innovations for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 in the area of Professional Services. These are the topics that are covered:

  • Shared-Risk-Based Revenue Recognition for Professional Service Projects (1IL)
  • Editability of Billing Plan Items for Fixed Price and Periodic Service in Manage Project Billing (4E9)
  • New Configuration to Flexibly Categorize Time and Expenses on the Itemized List in the Billing Document (4E9)
  • Example Situation for Professional Services Projects (J11)
  • More Options for Integration and Extensibility in the Area of Project Costs, Forecast Quantity, and Blocked Functions (J11)
  • Intelligent Resource Matching (6JO)

Watch this video to get a glimpse of the new features:

Shared-Risk-Based Revenue Recognition for Professional Service Projects (1IL)

Starting off with a rather big topic in this release.

So far planned revenues in Rev Rec were calculated either on a time and expense billing simulation for contract types “Time & Expense” or “Usage Based Billing” or they were based on the billing plan for the contract types “Fixed Price” and “Periodic Service”. Now there is a new revenue recognition method which utilizes financial planning values including ETC and EAC which are entered in the Review app. This increases the flexibility in revenue recognition and avoids manual efforts for adjusting accrued revenues.

One simple example, in a normal time and expense scenario so far revenue is calculated based on the determined billing material and the sales price. If the sales price is 100€ per hour, the realized revenue for one hour time recording is 100€. However not all time and expense contracts allow such a full realization of revenue, based on this maintained sales price. Some contracts can include what we call a shared risk model. This means the supplier and customer agree on a certain planned effort for delivering a certain scope. This new revenue accounting takes into consideration a cost based POC but still allows time and expense billing.

Please have a look at this blog post for more details and the demo here:

You can also find more details on the SAP Help Portal.

 

Let’s move on to the new topics in the project billing functionality. But before we do, please remember that Andreas Hammerschmidt updates his detailed blog “Project Billing for Customer Projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition” with every release, so you can find a comprehensive overview of the functionality there.

 

Editability of Billing Plan Items for Fixed Price and Periodic Service in Manage Project Billing (4E9)

We want to give more flexibility to the billing specialist. He can already edit billing due dates in the “Manage Project Billing! App. Now we want to extend this flexibility even further in the Fixed Price and Periodic Service scenario. The billing specialist is now able to make changes to the billing plan directly in the “Manage Project Billing” app, without the need to go back into the “Plan Customer Projects” app. This included editing the billing dates, the amounts and adding and deleting billing due dates.

 

For this new functionality you can also have look on the details in this video:

For even more details, please have a look at the entry of this topic on SAP Help Portal.

 

New Configuration to Flexibly Categorize Time and Expenses on the Itemized List in the Billing Document (4E9)

This next topic was already part of a previous CFD release, but we want to highlight it with this major release as well, for those of you who have not been aware of this functionality yet.

At the moment the itemized list, the details of the time and expense entries on an invoice output, was based on a fixed quantity-based logic. This meant if the posting period was quantity it was classified as time or if not it was classified as an expense. But customers want to create a more individualized listing criteria. For example, an expense posting, if you have a process with a purchase order and you create goods receipt in relationship to purchase orders, then this expense posting has a quantity, but you still want to see this posting as part of the expense section later on in the invoice output.  

Therefore, we have now as part of the existing SSCUI (SSCUI 103637) a new option in the billing profile, where you can define, whether a line item for the billing material determination is it a service or expense. Default will be empty, which is the old logic, so existing customers will not be impacted by this change, unless it is actively changed in the system.

You want more? Take a look at this demo:

 

Example Situation for Professional Services Projects (J11)

This next feature is helping to make the system more proactive for the users working with it.

There can be certain situations, where you want to inform project managers or other supporting roles about special situations. Professional Services projects have been enabled for the extended situation framework. Now an administrator/key user can now go to “Manage Situation Types – Extended” app and define your own situations, which the system should run regular checks and inform defined people automatically. Project managers will be informed directly on their home screen and can take the needed action right from there.

 

 

More Options for Integration and Extensibility in the Area of Project Costs, Forecast Quantity, and Blocked Functions (J11)

We continue to work on the flexibility of our product SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. There will be more CDS views and an API released in the context of the J11 scope item. There are a couple that will only be available with the 2408.1 CFD release. Here is a list:

  • CDS view for blocked functions of WBS elements in enterprise projects and work packages of professional services projects​
  • CDS view with planned costs and planned revenue for work packages of professional services projects, based on planned work package demands (e.g., team roles and expenses)​ (Release 2408.1 only)
  • oData API to set forecast month and maintain Estimate to Complete for work packages of professional services projects​ (Release 2408.1 only)​

 

Intelligent Resource Matching (6JO)

The scope item 6JO is part of the Cloud for Projects functionality on the BTP.

Searching skilled employees for a resource request is one of the key activities within project management. In this context we created an AI use case to support users struggling with this task daily.

The advanced skill match supports resource managers to find the right candidates for their open resource requests.​ Considering similar skills to the skills which are requested and maintained in the profile​. It shows resource manager the requested skills and skills maintained in the profile in the matching candidate list​.

This feature makes it even easier to find candidates for resource requests.

Please take a look at the demo here:

This use case is currently in a Beta phase and is currently in the planning to be generally available later this year, but as you know this might be changes made to future planning.

For more information, see: Get Involved Early

Register and experience the latest AI features in
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and influence upcoming AI developments.

 

Thanks for taking the time to read this blog.

If you are interested in the latest and greatest blogs on Professional Services, please have a look at my collection blog and also take a look at the Community page for Professional Services.

 

 

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts.

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn and X.

entry.title: Publication of SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 and more...
entry.content:
We successfully launched content updates for SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 in EARL this week. These are now readily available to our customer channels Digital Discovery Assessment, Cloud ALM, and Process Navigator. Besides, the process updates for the following have also been deployed:

  • SAP Best Practices for SAP Marketing Cloud 2408
  • SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud for public sector 2408
  • SAP Best Practices for Analytics with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
  • SAP Best Practices for Analytics with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023

With the new Process Navigator version, we also provide new additional filters to find all Two-Tier related solution processes. 

Figure 1: Filter for Two-Tier ERP to find the respective solution processes.

In conjunction with content updates, we introduced again several new features to Process Navigator on SAP for Me, based on feedback from our customers, partners, and internal users.

Following new features are available: 

  • Enable comparison for solution scenarios and for processes of different release versions or different localizations 
  • Show applications and application roles for solution activities in solution process flow diagrams 
  • Enable mass assets download for selected solution processes 
  • Show the total number of solution processes, new solution processes, and number of solution processes flow diagrams for a solution scenario 
  • Filter solution processes by application, application roles, solution capabilities and solution components on global search page 

Figure 2: Compare functionality on solution scenario level with other country/region or other version.

By using the comparison function to compare two release versions, you can easily identify the changes that have been made. The changes are displayed in color and provide a great opportunity for side-by-side comparison in the split view.

Figure 3: Compare result page in a side-by-side view pointing out all changes.

In addition to the current filters for solution scenario version and country/region, new filtering options have been introduced. Users can now apply filters for application, application role, and capability as well. 

Figure 4: Filter for application, application role and capability.

Furthermore, we provide new personalization features in Process Navigator:

  • Enable tile sequence personalization on the homepage
  • Enable tab sequence personalization on the scenario and process detail page
  • Preferred country/region as the default filter for global search results
  • Notification about new features

Figure 5: Personalization options on the page, and the user default settings.

The personalization feature lets users customize the Process Navigator view according to their own needs, considering each user's distinct characteristics and behaviors. Keep an eye out for upcoming updates on personalization and continuous enhancements to usability. 

In the last quarter, the Process Navigator saw over 4,000,000 visits indicating a high demand for SAP Best Practices. This motivates our team to keep improving the tool, adding valuable information, and prioritizing user-friendliness. 

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment in our Feedback Service tool or ask your questions and engage with the experts.

entry.title: Higher Education & Research in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Dear SAP Highered & Research Cloud ERP enthusiast, 

As the summer sun shines brightly, we proudly welcome the latest SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition release, 2408, for Higher Education & Research. This new release is again packed with new features, and groundbreaking UX and AI innovations. This release promises to elevate the user experience and harness the power of artificial intelligence, offering enhanced capabilities and efficiencies.

In addition to these innovations, the 2408 release introduces enhanced features in Grants and Budget (Funds) Management, crucial for higher education and research institutions. These enhancements include more sophisticated tracking and reporting capabilities for grants, allowing institutions to manage funds more effectively and ensure compliance with funding requirements. The enhanced budget management features offer comprehensive tools for planning, monitoring, and adjusting budgets, providing greater financial control and transparency.

As higher education and research institutions, globally, increasingly migrate to cloud solutions, they have a specific focus on embracing best practices and standardizing processes to boost resilience and cost-effectiveness in managing finance, procurement, and funded research project operations. The 2408 release is tailored to meet these evolving needs, ensuring that universities, colleges, K-12 schools, and research institutes can streamline their back-office processes and achieve greater operational efficiency.

One notable trend driving this shift is the focus on "Financial Keys to the Future" as highlighted in EDUCAUSE's Top 10 IT Issues, Technologies, and Trends for 2024. This trend emphasizes the critical need for modernized, flexible, ERP that drives process automation — goals that SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 directly addresses with its cutting-edge cloud capabilities and best-practices processes.

We hereby invite you to dive deeper into the exciting new features and enhancements of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. And explore how these innovations are set to support your higher education and research institutions, making them work smarter and more agile.

Enjoy reading and drop me a message if you have any questions!

Cloud ERP core enhancements

Before diving into the innovations for Grants & Budget Management please find below a range of new core Cloud ERP feature-based innovations for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and the 2408 release. Out of the range of line of business enhancements, I have selected 3 topics which I believe are very relevant for institutions of highered and research: UX, Finance, and Environment, Health and Safety.

If you are interested in other areas of innovations for SAP’s Cloud ERP, please check out the Release Video from Bert Schulze:

User Experience

Through AI, we speed up your work and transform the user experience, starting with our generative AI copilot, Joule. After a successful phased roll-out in the Early Adopter Care program, Joule will soon be available for your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system, expected in Q3/2024. Joule allows you to express business needs in natural language, providing easy access to applications and data, reducing manual tasks, and boosting productivity.


Screenshot: Our natural-language, generative AI copilot Joule provides easy access to applications and data.

Finance

In finance, we now offer a new cost center review booklet. This app presents actual and planned costs clearly, organizing various predefined reports under the 'Actuals' and 'Plan/Actuals' sections. It integrates essential insights into the business context, effectively answering key business queries. Combining application logic, guidance, and multidimensional insights, it fulfills the "insight to action" promise within embedded analytics. Users can review actual and planned data in a single report and switch between guided views and flexible slicing, dicing, and pivoting according to specific business needs.   


Screenshot:  Display, analyze, and validate cost center data with the new review booklet.

Also, you can now analyze and summarize data from the cost-center review booklet into actionable financial business insights with the help of generative AI.

Please note this use case is available in beta testing! Check out the SAP Customer Influence page to sign up: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3698


Screenshot:  Gain financial business insights with the help of generative AI.

Environment, Health, and Safety

A new app for Environment, Health & Safety, for managing investigations significantly enhances tracking and oversight, making processes more efficient in managing your (investigation) projects. The 'Manage Investigations' app offers a detailed platform to document and manage phases, personnel, and timelines of investigations. Administrators can easily guide investigations and assign tasks. This tool combines simplicity with robust features, ensuring procedural integrity. It ultimately improves user experience, accountability, and overall efficiency in investigation management.


Screenshot: The new ‘Manage Investigations’ app fosters great efficiency in managing the investigation process. 

Grants & Budget Management

The S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition offers a comprehensive set of features and functions of Grants and Budget Management for public sector entities that include state and local governments, cities, K-12 schools, and Higher Education & Research.

With the 2408 release, there have been a range of new enhancements delivered and made available for our (Higher) Education & Research customers. Below an overview on the new 2408 enhancements.

New country versions for: Australia, the Netherlands, and the United Kingdom

The 2408 release introduces the Public Sector Management (PSM) scope bundle, now as well accessible, beside the US, Germany, and Canada, also for Australia, The Netherlands, and the UK. This specific industry scope bundle, which is built, with and for Higher Education & Research, comprises specific processes designed for higher education and research. These higher education and research-specific processes include the unique functionality required for the financial management of sponsored research, grants, and funds. Also, they are complemented by for example core processes for finance, procurement, logistics, asset accounting, treasury, leasing, sales, plant maintenance, contract account and project management.

You can use the SAP Process Navigator for further details, and to get a complete overview of which scope items are made available in this new global PSM scope bundle.

Direct link to the Roadmap Explorer: road map item


Screenshot: SAP for Me, and the Higher Education & Research specific scope items.

Navigational assistance with the Joule co-pilot

Features:

Express your business requirement in natural language and have the Joule copilot enable navigation to applications in budget management, grantee management, and fund accounting, where you can execute your business processes

Benefits:

  • Improve user satisfaction through the ability to express business requirements in natural language
  • Quickly and efficiently navigate to the ideal, relevant applications, with the help of Joule


Screenshot: SAP Joule, using to navigate through the system.

Substitution Tool for Budget Maintenance

Features:

You now have the ability to automatically derive values (for example, for account assignments, budget type, and item description) when creating a budget document using the app for maintaining budget document

Benefits:

  • Better usability and faster end-user input
  • Improve data quality by prepopulating the right data

Screenshot: SAP app for Manage Substitution and Validation Rules

Ability to consume the budget for an expected expense instead of the posting date

Features:

  • Configure the behavior of the budget consumption date
  • Leverage this feature to use a due date (or expected expense date) as a budget consumption date; for instance, update purchase orders with a delivery date of next year to consume next year’s budget

Benefits:

  • Post commitments into future years even when the document is created today
  • Avoid consuming this year’s budget and prevent unnecessary carry forwards
  • Improve compliance in some countries where this is a legal requirement

Direct link to the Roadmap Explorer: road map item


Screenshot: SAP configuration for define update date for budget consumption.

Checking budget availability using project hierarchies

Features:

  • Summarize a project budget using universal hierarchies
  • Use project hierarchies with work breakdown structure elements and universal hierarchies

Benefits:

  • You can now roll up budgets for certain projects within the project hierarchy and other projects using universal hierarchies
  • Capabilities to model a program structure above project hierarchies
  • Use project hierarchies without maintaining additional universal hierarchies


Screenshot: SAP configuration for defining availability control profile and Journal Field Dependencies.

Budget updates for generating budget documents

Features:

Allowing the generation of budget documents when the budget is uploaded, including documents from budget planning tools or Microsoft Excel

Benefits:

Give users a consistent base of budget maintenance documents for uploaded and manually created budget documents

 
Screenshot: SAP app to manage jobs, in this case automatic budget header creation.

Reporting on the budget versus payments and open invoices 

Features:

  • Ability to compare budgets against payments and open invoices
  • Align budgetary reporting with financial and management reporting

Benefits:

Obtain real-time information about budget spending

Direct link to the Roadmap Explorer: road map item


Screenshot: SAP app to query and report on budget and payment line items.

Higher Education & Research Learning Journeys

In late 2023, three new learning journeys were released on Learnings.sap.com. These journeys provide access to close to 500 pages of educational content, with ongoing digital content updates. Seize the chance to enhance your comprehension of the solution through these comprehensive courses covering Budget Management, Grants Management, and Fund Accounting (US specific)!


Screenshot: SAP Learning Hub - Learning Journeys 

More info on the Grant and Budget management functionalities can be found via the Product Documentation and Help webpage: SAP.Help.com 

Screenshot: SAP Help.com 

For more information on what is coming into the next release for S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition,  please scroll through the SAP Roadmap Explorer.

 
Screenshot: SAP Roadmap Explorer 

Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series!

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Did you miss the live sessions? We've got you covered!

Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand –anywhere, anytime.

Find All of Our Assets

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

 ================================================================================

Closing Words

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts.

Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts.

Thank you!

Rob Jonkers - SAP Higher Education & Research

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：可拓展性
entry.content:
大家好，我们即将迎来 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 大版本的更新。在本篇博客中，我将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 当中可拓展性部分的亮点更新内容。

可拓展性概览

在公有云系统中，我们提供了丰富多样的可拓展性选择，包括关键用户可拓展性、开发人员可拓展性和端到端可拓展性。在面对不同的业务需求时，我们可能需要使用可拓展性来实现。 SAP 的可拓展性那么我们应该如何找到正确的可拓展性选择呢？根据下面的图片，您可以在下面的决策图中，我们从不同的角度进行分析，让您根据自己的业务需求，找到正确的可拓展性选项。

拓展字段向导

现在，借助拓展字段向导，您可以使用开发人员可拓展性更快捷地创建拓展字段，以满足您的自定义要求。 拓展字段向导可以帮您回答哪些扩展对象是需要的，以及如何实施扩展（语法、注释等）。

拓展字段向导的适用范围包括：端到端的字段可拓展性。借助生成器，客户和合作伙伴可以将 RAP 业务对象从数据库表扩展到 UI 或 API OData 服务。在生成之后，生成的部件属于客户和合作伙伴，并由他们维护。但现阶段，无法使用生成器对生成的部件进行修改。同时，生成器支持一次性创建多个拓展字段。

 

大批量交付

借助开发人员可扩展性，作为客户或合作伙伴，您可以使用一次性交付进行ABAP开发。提供打包的附加产品，客户可以在其环境中安装这些产品，允许以可扩展的方式将扩展分发给大量客户。在三系统环境中使用ADT开发扩展，然后使用 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 的 Landscape Portal 打包和分发您的扩展。

定制开发可以由合作伙伴代表客户在一个独立的开发系统中执行，该系统不与客户环境连接，然后使用“Git-Enabled Change and Transport System”（gCTS）部署在客户的三系统环境中。ABAP扩展的源代码存储在远程Git存储库中，gCTS用于在SAP S/4HANA Cloud环境和Git存储库之间传输（推送和拉取）ABAP自定义代码。当传输请求的任务发布时，使用ADT在开发环境中创建提交。

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：制造（生产工程&生产工序）
entry.content:
欢迎来到我的博客。

本篇博文将为大家介绍制造领域里面生产工程和生产工序的2408版本亮点前瞻。

Production Engineering/生产工程：Routing/工艺路线

用户可以通过API：https://api.sap.com/api/CE_API_PRODUCTION_ROUTING_0002/resource/Production_Routing 在与第三方软件如（MES） 集成时新增工艺路线。客户可以根据需要进行必要的操作。

Production Engineering/生产工程：Production version/生产版本

用户可以通过“处理生产版本”完成对生产版本的批量编辑的操作:

  1. 仅对现有生产版本执行批量编辑；
  2. 单次最大编辑数量为100.超过100，计数将为红色，紧挨着“批量编辑”；
  3. 不能对处于草稿状态的生产版本进行批量编辑。

用户可以对于已选的生产版本进行相关参数的变更，如替换新的值。如将最小批量从1替换到5：

 

 

 

 

Production operation/生产工序：Manage production order/管理生产订单

在管理生产订单应用中，已通过时间字段增强"更改日期和数量"弹出窗口。它们使您能够更改提供时间计划的计划类型的计划开始或计划结束时间，例如 时间上向前 和 时间上向后 。

生产主管/计划人员可以通过该页面的提供的功能轻松应对计划变更。

*要使用户能够访问此应用，需要为其业务用户分配以下业务目录：生产控制（离散）- 订单控制 (SAP_SCM_BC_PRODN_ORD_CTRL_MC)

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：寻源和采购话题
entry.content:
本篇博客展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 当中寻源和采购版块发布的新功能以及重大变化须知，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 寻源和合同管理
  • 运营采购
  • 发票管理

寻源和合同管理

批量更改采购信息记录

  1. 现在可以使用“版本”字段批量更新类别为“转包的”采购信息记录的生产版本。

管理采购合同

  1. 现在可以实现采购合同的版本管理。更改并发布已批准或已拒绝采购合同的版本相关字段时，将自动创建新版本。

配置信息 

SSCUI103497 用来配置更改原因（例如，法律更改或文档问题）

SSCUI 103498 用来配置是否激活版本管理，以及哪些字段在更改后会导致创建新版本。

 

测试结果：

当更改合同到期日从2024-07-23到2024-07-24点保存，看到两个报错，因为我们在103498配置了‘新版本原因’和‘采购员注释’两个字段为必输。

输入进去后就可以保存合同，并且看到合同创建了新的版本信息。

运营采购

应用：我的采购申请（新）

  1. “在我的采购申请 - 新”应用中，您可以在采购申请项目的“状态详细信息”查看预制发票作为采购申请项目的后续凭证。

注意：此应用是 “创建采购申请” 和 “我的采购申请” 应用的后继。“创建采购申请和”“我的采购申请”应用自 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2308 起弃用。缺省情况下，已弃用的应用在 SAP Fiori 快速启动板上可能不再可用。在这种情况下，您可以在应用查找器中找到该应用，直到将其删除为止。我们建议您尽快切换到“我的采购申请 - 新建”后继应用。

  1. 采购申请中的订单确认和提前装运通知

作为员工，“在我的采购申请 - 新”应用中，您现在可以在采购申请项目的“状态详细信息”中查看“订单确认”和“提前装运通知”。

应用：处理采购申请 (V2)

现在可以根据“处理采购申请 (V2) 应用中的以下新字段过滤和查看采购申请项目：

固定供应商名称

期望供应商名称

地区

采购申请（高级）

在此应用中通过采购申请项目创建具有自定义凭证类型的采购订单。

SSCUI 102909 定义采购申请的凭证类型中配置了采购订单类型ZNB

选中这条点击‘链接采购申请 - 凭证类型’维护了ZNJ的采购申请的类型。

当对ZNJ类型的采购申请创建采购订单时：

可以看到默认出来的采购订单类型是ZNB

同时，也可以通过采购订单凭证类型的映射基于业务加载项“确定：采购订单的凭证类型” (ME_BSART_DETERMINE) 来更灵活地决定采购订单类型。

应用：转包凭证清理

可以更正相关转包采购凭证（采购订单、计划协议、采购申请或预留）的不一致（如果有）这些不一致可能由程序错误引起。

发票管理

应用：管理供应商发票

单击“显示更改日志”按钮时，将显示抬头和项目级别供应商发票的所有已更改凭证信息的日志。

应用：上载供应商发票

使用两个新状态“发票草稿已删除”和“发票已删除”，便可以跟踪发票草稿或发票是否已删除。此外，已启用“导出”功能，现在您可以将已上载的供应商发票清单直接导出到 Microsoft Excel 或在导出前调整格式等设置。

应用：计划供应商发票作业 - 高级

通过“计划供应商发票作业 - 高级”应用中的此功能，您现在可以在通过电子邮件向供应商发送“评估收据结算” (ERS) 开发票凭证时使用新的电子邮件模板 MM_IV_DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_ERS。

新业务加载项 (BAdI) MRM_ERS_CLOUD_FDP_ITEM 可用。

缺省情况下，新的 ERS 电子邮件模板在“输出参数确定”应用中供应商发票的确定步骤“电子邮件设置中”设置为电子邮件模板。

更多关于 SAP S/4HANA Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition:

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：制造（生产计划）
entry.content:
在SAP 公有云2408版本发布之际，想借本篇博客和大家一起来看下制造的生产计划部分有哪些更新和变化。

总的来说，在生产计划领域，本次版本的变化主要在于系统使用控制的精细化和操作的方便性上面，包括以下几个核心变化点：

  1. 为了使用户在系统中操作数据更加清晰地锁定在自己管辖范围，在App缓冲定位 和 产品批量维护（DD）中，我们均增加了职责范围的设定，您现在可以从“应用设置”菜单中选择基于 MRP 控制者的职责范围，这样在您下次访问时系统会默认将数据限制在已设定的职责范围内。

  1. 在App 计划产品分类（DD）中，增加了一个勾选项：“排除备选物料清单”，选中该复选框时，如果一个组件在不同的备选BOM中都存在，物料清单用途值将不会增加。清除此复选框可在计划产品分类的作业中将备选物料清单包含在计算范围之内。

  1. 可使用归档对象“PP_TDPSTK”将生产计划的时间相关库存进行归档。该归档对象包含时间相关库存表中的数据，比如如下字段：

字段

简短描述

MANDT

客户端

MATNR

物料编号

WERKS

工厂

BERID

MRP范围

DATE_FROM

有效期起始日期

DATE_TO

有效期截止日期

SAFETY_STOCK

安全库存

REORDER_POINT

重订货点

TARGET_STOCK

目标库存水平

MAX_STOCK

最大库存水平

STOCK_UNIT

基本计量单位

SAFETY_DOS

安全供应天数（工作日）

TARGET_DOS

目标供应天数（工作日）

MAX_DOS

最大供应天数（工作日）

CHANGE_MODE

更改模式

PROP_DATE_FROM

建议有效期起始日期

PROP_VER

建议版本

PROPOSAL_ID

建议标识

CREATED_BY

创建对象的负责人姓名

CHANGED_BY

更改对象的人员姓名

CREATED_TIME

简短格式的 UTC 时戳 (YYYYMMDDhhmmss)

CHANGED_TIME

简短格式的 UTC 时戳 (YYYYMMDDhhmmss)

基于不同公司的时间相关库存数量差异可能比较大，在执行归档之前，建议先以测试运行模式归档一定数量的时间相关库存，便于估计所有数据归档的实际执行时间。

  1. 在产能计划板App的管理工序页面可以通过拖拽的方式对订单工序进行跨生产版本的重新计划了
  2. 当您对物料运行MRP计划后，系统对于MRP元素有些建议操作，以确保按计划覆盖需求。这些建议是以附加列的形式在“监控物料覆盖范围 - 净细分”和“监控物料覆盖范围 - 净值和单个细分”应用中显示，其中包括重新计划建议的数量。在以往的版本中，该列信息是需要在激活新功能的配置应用中激活后才能显示，从2408版本开始，无需激活即可使用该功能了。

  1. 在管理计划订单应用中，我们添加了转换按钮，这样您就可以方便快捷地在这里将多个计划订单批量转换成生产订单/流程订单，或者采购申请了。

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻: 财务话题
entry.content:
在本篇博文中，展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 中财务的部分功能，覆盖以下内容：

【必须知晓】

版本升级前的必要任务

在版本升级到 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 之前，必须已检查资产会计中受影响业务目录角色中新限制类型的值。这会影响标准业务目录和自定义业务目录（通过开发人员可扩展性创建的 IAM 业务目录）：详情请参见博客来调整。

【新功能】

“过账资产重估”应用

App 'Post Asset Revaluation'

使用新的“过账资产重估”应用 (F7775)，您可以手动过账重估。

新的重估应用使您能够使用重置价值（即与购置和生产成本不同）重估资产。例如，您可以执行重估以将市场价值原则应用于资产会计。

新应用将替换之前的应用“过账资产重估” (ABAWL) 。之前的应用已弃用。

之前的 ABAWL 应用使用资产交易类型。交易类型确定如何重估资产，例如，891 “上一年度重估（向下）”、897 “当前年度重估（向下）”。在进一步处理期间必须记住这些内容。但是，在新应用中，您可以在过账之前直接指定相应的参数。因此，无法再使用不同的交易类型区分不同的重估。而是使用新的业务交易类型概念。

新应用提供了与“管理固定资产”应用的更好集成：“在管理固定资产”应用中，您可以选择资产并跳转到新的重估应用。重估过账后，您可以导航回“管理固定资产”应用并检查资产值。

新应用在以下业务目录中可用：

业务目录，名称

业务目录，技术名称

“资产会计 - 资产重估”

SAP_FIN_BC_AA_REVAL_PC

数据修复工具

范围项目40Y (公司间对账流程)、1SG (组报表 - 财务合并)引入了“数据整改工具”应用 (ICADR) 以从数据源同步 ICADOCM 表以解决由于各种原因导致的数据不一致，例如，在匹配运行或将新扩展字段添加到数据源后更改配置。该工具还可用于删除过时的分配和匹配项目。

可通过以下模式之一执行数据修复：

“转入缺少的项目”：检查并纠正源中任何缺少的数据到 ICADOCM。

“从源同步凭证删除”：针对已从源中删除的凭证的所有匹配项目标记为已删除。

“更新字段值”：填写或更新特定字段的值。

“删除过时分配”：删除未分配分配和匹配项目的数据记录，这些数据记录通常由具有“临时解决”设置的原因代码或用户的手动取消分配操作生成。

含业务交易类型的新自动调整过账场景

新过账场景 SA002（“按业务交易类型的会计核算调整过账”）可用于“在定义过账规则 - 公司间匹配和对账中创建过账规则”。与 SA001（“按凭证类型的会计核算调整过账”）相比，过账规则具有以下差异：

您可以指定业务交易类型，例如 ICAA（“公司间调整过账”），用于自动调整过账凭证。在 SA001 中固定为 RFBU（“FI 过账”）。

凭证类型 (IR) 派生自指定的业务交易类型。

此外，ACDOCA 中的以下六个字段可用于在场景 SA001 和 SA002 下定义过账规则：

DATASOURCE_ID（“财务数据源”）

FS_PRODUCT_GROUP（“产品组 (FS)”）

BRANCH_ID（“分支 (FS)”）

KDGRP（“客户组”）

BRSCH（“行业”）

LAND1（“国家/地区”）

您可以在 定义过账规则 应用中的新场景 SA002 下创建过账规则。提供示例规则 SA002（“按业务交易类型的会计核算调整过账”）供您参考。

切换到管理日记账分录（新版本）

请注意，“管理日记账分录（旧版本）”（应用标识：F0717）应用已弃用，将在即将发布的版本中删除。我们建议您尽快切换到后继应用“管理日记账分录（新版本）”（应用标识：F0717A），以避免业务中断。

除了允许执行可在旧版本中执行的所有操作，新版本还提供了附加功能，更为顺畅的工作流和改进的用户体验。

新版本允许您：

请参阅预制的日记账分录。

显示工作流审批状态。

如果您是预测会计客户，查看预测日记账分录。

按金额过滤和排序日记账分录。

添加更多字段以按和显示过滤。

新版本会将您连接到这些应用：

显示凭证流

过账一般日记账分录

验证一般日记账分录 - 针对申请人

新版本可帮助您更高效地工作：

日记账分录在拆分屏幕中打开，允许您滚动日记账分录的主清单和详细信息屏幕并与之交互。

通过使用“显示更多”或“显示更少”按钮，可以展开或折叠日记账分录清单中显示的详细信息级别。

相关应用和功能的按钮已在用户界面上显示，并位于您需要的位置，减少了点击次数和鼠标的移动。

管理运营总账科目

3系统架构的用户，可以使用“管理运营总账科目”应用，您可以根据角色和您访问的系统对运营总账科目的主数据执行操作。

管理“运营总账科目”应用可由不同用户访问，以执行不同的任务。会计部门可以显示和检查账户信息。您的配置专家和专家会计用户可以使用适当的权限，根据需要创建和更改运营总账科目主数据。

即将发生的从快速启动板中搜索日记账分录的更改

目前，当您从 SAP Fiori 快速启动板中搜索现有日记账分录时，您将转到日记账分录资料表，缺省情况下，您可以通过导航访问“编辑和”“冲销”功能。此缺省行为将在即将发布的版本中更改，用户将只能访问基于“显示日记账分录”应用的日记账分录的显示视图，无法访问编辑或冲销功能。

通知用户此即将进行的更改。发布新行为时，将提供使用权限解决显示限制的相关信息。

在财务会计里打印客户发票

在此版本中，您可以使用新的 以 PDF 格式打印和通过电子邮件发送 FI 客户发票和贷项凭证

创建信函应用中的信函类型 SAP21（FI 客户发票）。现在，您可以使用

SAP S/4HANA 输出控制框架，用于使用缺省内容配置 FI 客户发票的输出

SAP 提供的表单模板和电子邮件模板，或者您可以根据您的业务需求。

注意：

只能打印从“创建销售发票”或“上载客户未清”过账的凭证

此外，您可以使用自定义字段或附加标准字段扩展缺省表单模板。 有关详细信息，请参阅使用自定义字段扩展表单模板 和使用自定义字段扩展表单模板.

配置

在打印并通过电子邮件发送 FI 客户发票或贷项凭证之前，您需要通过以下方式配置输出：

使用“输出参数确定”应用。有关详细信息，请参阅 配置 FI 客户发票的输出。

成本中心审核手册

通过此应用，您可以显示、分析和验证成本中心数据。该应用显示有关实际和计划成本的信息，并对“实际”和 “计划/实际”下的多个预定义报表进行分组。此页面集合形成审核手册。

通过付款通知的自定义逻辑添加附加电子邮件收件人

通过此功能，您可以实施自定义逻辑，以使用云业务加载项 (BAdI) APOC_ADD_EMAIL_RECIPIENTS“添加电子邮件收件人 () 为付款通知添加电子邮件收件人”。
作为关键用户，您可以在“自定义逻辑”应用中实施自定义逻辑，以便为付款通知输出添加多个电子邮件收件人。在输出参数确定期间调用自定义逻辑，并返回电子邮件地址和电子邮件类型代码的表（即 TO 和 CC）。有关详细信息，请参阅添加付款通知的附加电子邮件收件人。

注意
将通过以下方式检查自定义逻辑中提供的电子邮件地址：

不会接管空电子邮件地址（没有任何警告消息）。

无效电子邮件收件人也将被忽略（但用户会收到相应的警告消息）。

仅当在“输出参数确定”应用中相应地配置相应的电子邮件类型代码时，才会接管具有电子邮件类型代码的条目。

在“管理过账期间”应用中显示变更日志

“显示”“变更日志”功能在管理过账期间应用（应用标识：F2293）中可用。

您可以使用 “显示变更日志” 功能显示所选过账期间变式更改的详细信息。无论何时创建、更改或删除过账期间数据，都会自动记录这些操作。利用“显示更改日志”功能，可直接在“管理过账期间”应用中显示这些记录。一次可显示一个过账期间变式的更改日志。

删除自动科目确定中的内容

“自动科目确定”配置活动为您提供许多流程，使您能够快速查找自动过账的目标科目。在此版本中，您可以删除由您或其他用户创建的科目分配项目。
允许删除科目分配的功能适用于此应用中的所有流程，但不影响任何 SAP 预提供的科目分配。

余额验证中的 QTD 度量

除了 YTD 和定期金额度量外，QTD（季度迄今）金额度量现在还可用于定义验证规则中的操作数。这支持验证结果中的四分之一到季度数据分析。

实际成本的CDS View发布

CDS 视图名称

CDS 视图描述

产品文档

I_ActualCostingRunResult

实际成本核算运行结果Actual Costing Run Result

链接

I_MatlInvtryLdgrQtyStructure

含数量结构的物料库存分类账 Matl Invtry Ledger with Qty Structure

 

链接

【弃用信息】

弃用基于期间的应用（范围项目 BEI）

提供了基于事件的生产成本过账（范围项目 3F0），作为传统解决方案期末关账 - 工厂（范围项目 BEI）的替代品。

自 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 起，以下基于期间的应用已弃用，将在即将发布的版本中从 SAP Fiori 快速启动板中删除：

“计算在制品 - 集中” (KKAO)

“计算在制品（订单 - 单个）”(KKAX)

“运行差异计算（订单 - 按批量）”(KKS1)

“运行差异计算（订单 - 单个）”(KKS2)

“运行差异计算 - 按期间” (KKS5)

“结算订单（优化）”(CO88H)

“运行实际结算（订单 - 单个）”(KO88)

“预结算联产品或返工 - 集中” (CO8A)

“预结算联产品或返工 - 单个” (CO8B)

“分析汇总层次结构” (KKBC_HOE_H)

“选择订单” (S_ALR_87013127)

“分析订单” (KKBC_ORD)

“分析产品成本收集器” (KKBC_PKO)

“生产成本分析” (F1780)

“计划产品成本核算作业” (F3683) 中的以下作业：

“联产品的初步结算”

“差异计算（按批量）”

“差异计算（按期间）”

“在制品计算”

“实际结算：生产、流程订单和产品成本收集器”

“实际结算（仅含分类账特定成本的订单）”

缺省情况下，已弃用的应用在 SAP Fiori 快速启动板上可能不再可用。在这种情况下，您可以在应用查找器中找到它们，直到将其删除。我们建议您尽快切换到基于事件的生产成本过账的替换应用。有关替换应用和功能比较的列表，请参阅 制造订单的基于事件 (3F0) 与基于期间 (BEI) 的生产成本过账。

此外，以下已发布的 CDS 视图也已弃用：

已弃用 CDS 视图

后继 CDS 视图

C_MfgOrderWIPVarianceQuery (制造订单的在制品和差异 - 查询（非基于事件）)

C_MfgOrderEvtBsdWIPVarcQry (基于事件的制造订单的在制品和差异 - 查询)

I_MfgOrderWIPVariance (制造订单的在制品和差异 - 多维数据集（非基于事件）)

I_MfgOrderEvtBsdWIPVariance (基于事件的制造订单的在制品和差异 - 多维数据集)

弃用以下两个配置活动：

  • “定义分配” (103108)
  • “维护汇总层次结构” (102913)

要设置基于事件的生产成本过账，请使用配置活动“基于事件的在制品和差异过账” (103940)。

弃用实际评估、计划分配和计划间接费用分配应用

自 SAP S/4HANA 2408 起，多个分配应用已弃用，将在即将发布的版本中从 SAP Fiori 快速启动板中删除。这些已弃用的应用将替换为通用分配中的应用。我们建议您尽快切换到后继应用。

 

已弃用的应用包括：

分配：创建计划分配 (FINS_ONEALLOC_D7)

分配：删除计划分配 (FINS_ONEALLOC_DA)

分配：显示计划分配 (FINS_ONEALLOC_D9)

分配：显示计划间接费用分配 (FINS_ONEALLOC_A9)

分配：创建计划间接费用分配 (FINS_ONEALLOC_A7)

分配：删除计划间接费用分配 (FINS_ONEALLOC_AA)

分配：概览计划间接费用分配 (FINS_ONEALLOC_AC)

创建实际分摊周期总账 (FAGLGA11)

更改实际分摊周期总账 (FAGLGA12)

显示实际分摊周期总账 (FAGLGA13)

删除实际分摊周期总账 (FAGLGA14)

执行实际分摊总账 (FAGLGA15)

概览实际分摊总账 (FAGLGA16)

缺省情况下，已弃用的应用在 SAP Fiori 快速启动板上可能不再可用。在彻底删除之前，您可以通过应用查找器访问这些应用。

这些已弃用的应用将替换为通用分配中的应用。通用分配是一组应用，允许您将计划或实际值从发送方对象分配到接收方对象。分配值可以是初级成本和收入、次级成本、非运营费用和收入、资产负债表科目值和数量。已分配值、发送方对象和接收方对象的类型取决于分配上下文。

已弃用应用或模板

后继应用或模板

“管理分配”（应用标识：F3338）

评估范围中退役的应用和作业模板

目前，SAP S/4HANA Cloud 在财务会计作业中为期末关账操作提供传统评估和高级评估。传统评估中的以下应用和作业模板将在未来设置为已弃用，并且不再适用于新客户。定义传统评估后，将在单独的新增内容中宣布弃用。

弃用过账客户付款 - 含打印应用

过账客户付款 - 打印应用已弃用，不久后将从快速启动板中删除。我们建议您改用 过账收款 应用或 过账付款 应用和 创建信函 应用。

弃用过账收款 - 针对客户应用

过账收款 - 针对客户应用已弃用，将在即将发布的版本中从 SAP Fiori 快速启动板中删除。我们建议您改用过账收款应用。

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：分析报表
entry.content:
在本篇博客中，我将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 当中分析报表版块发布的功能，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 嵌入式 SAC 故事：优化设计体验
  • 自定义分析查询和服务
  • 新审核手册功能：评论、计算、财务业务洞察等

嵌入式 SAC 故事：优化设计体验

 

为了提供更多的功能，更好的性能和易用性，嵌入式SAC在CE2408提供了优化设计体验，包含了以下增强：

  • 性能优化
    • 加载时间缩短
    • 全新的渲染体验
    • 提前生成故事所需的分析查询等
  • 可用性优化
    • 提供撤销/重做
    • 图表生成器面板已重新设计
    • “可用对象”面板和统计图加载项
    • 更多样式设置选项可用于统计图标题、子标题和页脚样式设置等

另外，原先的Classic Experience已逐步淘汰，并将在未来的更新后不再支持创建，修改等操作。因此，目前所有使用的Classic Experience的故事都会有弃用警告的提示，如下图：

 

 

所以在CE2408，嵌入式SAC也提供了支持客户将Classic Story转换为优化体验（Optimized Design）的功能。在编辑嵌入式SAC故事的界面，通过右下角的“转换并激活按钮” 即可完成转换。（注意：转换为优化体验的故事无法再转换为Classic Experience。）

此外，目前支持客户创建Classic Design Experience和Optimized Design Experience两种设计模式的故事。

 

更多关于优化故事体验的改进: 查看

优化模式下的限制：查看

 

自定义分析查询和服务

 

CE2408新增APP 自定义分析查询和服务，通过这个应用可以为报表和分析创建自定义分析查询。具体支持的功能如下：

  • 创建用于报告和分析的自定义分析映射视图。
  • 创建受限度量、计算所得度量、转换的度量和参数。
  • 定义显示和过滤器层次结构。
  • 创建次级结构。
  • 建模查询时预览结果集。
  • 将查询公开为 Odata 或 InA 服务。InA service可以用于APP 审核手册。

 

 

 

新审核手册功能：评论、计算、财务业务洞察等

在APP集团财务报表审核手册中，客户可以添加和审核注释。

新增APP成本中心审核手册 和APP 服务获利能力审核手册。

增加“活跃页面过滤器”按钮显示在活跃的过滤器的数量。使用它打开侧面板中的页面过滤器面板。

另外客户可以打开层次结构的上下文菜单，以钻取至层次结构中的较低级别或打开所有级别。

在“格式设置”选项卡上，客户可以定义阈值，并使用不同的背景颜色或彩色值显示阈值，并且可以将此类格式设置保存为私有变式或公共变式的一部分。

最后客户可以基于数据源的度量或结构创建计算，并将其添加到表和统计图中。

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：自动化测试工具
entry.content:
在本篇博客中，我将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 当中自动化测试工具版块发布的功能，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 客制化API测试
  • ABAP Units 仪表盘
  • 其他重要增强

客制化API测试

 

自动化测试工具一直致力于支持客户能够测试所有extensibility的功能以及客户在embedded steampunk中建的客制化。因此在CE2408，自动化测试工具的一大新增功能就是支持合作伙伴和客户创建的客制化的API的测试。

很多客户应该对自动化测试工具中的API测试非常熟悉。自动化测试工具支持对API Business Hub 上的API的测试。新功能客制化API测试也是相似的方法和流程。

 

在测试客制化API之前，客户需要首先确保已为客制化API维护好communication arrangement。然后再在自动化测试工具中为其创建必要的API测试。

 

ABAP Unit 仪表盘

在之前CE2402，自动化测试工具支持将ABAP unit添加到升级后测试中作为测试的一部分。测试中ABAP unit会被执行，测试的结果会以excel文件的形式给到客户。在CE2408中，自动化测试工具将会提升测试结果的可视化呈现，支持客户在APP分析自动化测试结果中查看ABAP UNIT的执行结果，以及其他重要的度量。

 

客户可以根据测试结果，在ADT中对ABAP Unit进行修改调整

其他重要增强

  1. TDC关联功能增强

在之前的版本中，客户在使用TDC的时候还需要手动维护TDC和测试脚本中字段的关系.在新版本中加强binding关系，根据Object Repository，将TDC的字段和脚本中的字段进行自动关联。

  1. 智能测试范围确定器 (i-TS) 应用增强

智能测试范围 确定器(i-TS) 应用现在允许最终用户根据应用范围过滤优化范围，并仅将所选范围推送到管理升级测试 (MUT)。

 

通过 i-TS 优化的范围的效率也可以在应用程序中可视化，从而更全面地了解智能范围设定功能带来的效率优化。

 

更多关于自动化测试工具的内容:

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 亮点前瞻：自动化测试工具 查看 
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Test Automation Tool - Our Approach to Test Automation 查看

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD)
entry.content:
在本篇博客中，我将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 当中RASD版块更新的内容，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 已使用对象
  • 后继Companion
  • CDS Comparator

 

（亮点1：）已使用对象

 

随着 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402.1 版本的发布，与可扩展性对象相关的所有更改（删除/弃用/更改）信息都将在页面“可扩展性对象中的更改概览”进行呈现。此页面涵盖了关键用户可扩展性和开发人员可扩展性的对象。因此RASD也进行了更新。

在标签页“已使用对象”下，原先的磁贴“已删除/已弃用的应用、API 和 CDS 视图”，“已更改和须知信息”和“新功能”已迁移到新的磁帖“已删除/已弃用可扩展性对象”，“已更改可扩展性对象”和“应用程序”中。

 

当客户点击进入新磁帖“已删除/已弃用可扩展性对象”，“已更改可扩展性对象”和“应用程序”中，客户将能够看到删除/弃用/更改的详细信息，涵盖了对象类型、对象的技术名称、对象描述、更改类型、更改详细信息以及有关删除/弃用/更改的附加信息。客户还可以通过链接直接导航到What’s New Viewer，方便客户查看详情。

 

（亮点2：）后继Companion

 

目前该标签页仅适用于主要版本，未来版本中会持续交付扩展此功能。

该标签页目前主要包含了两个主要的磁帖，分别是“范围项目影响”和“弃用覆盖范围”。

 

在“范围项目影响”磁帖中主要展示了基于租户的使用情况范围项目影响，为客户提供已激活和已使用范围项目的百分比。点击进入磁帖，客户可以查看详细的范围项目使用情况。

在“弃用覆盖范围”磁帖里提供给客户当前其正在使用的已弃用的对象和属性。进入磁帖后，客户还可以查看到已弃用对象/属性的后继对象/属性，以便客户可以在删除这些已弃用对象/属性时顺利切换到这些后继对象/属性。

 

（亮点3：）CDS Comparator

CDS Comparator是RASD发布新功能，支持客户可以查看已弃用的 CDS 视图并将其与后继 CDS 视图进行比较。

可以通过CDS Comparator按钮触发该功能，如下图所示：

 

 

客户还可以通过有关自定义 CDS 视图磁帖里使用CDS Comparator，例如：

 

CDS Comparator里提供详细视图，通过并排的方式来比较已弃用 CDS 视图和后继CDS视图中字段的差异，例如字段的删除，或者是字段的弃用/更改，亦或者是有新增字段。同时客户可以使用仅查看改变字段的功能，一键快速查看两个CDS的差异；且提供颜色标识，能够让客户一目了然了解的字段变化信息。

 

 

 

 更多关于 SAP S/4HANA Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition:

  • 向客户发布的Release Assessment and Scope Dependency Tool (RASD 2.0) 查看
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2302亮点前瞻：RASD 2.0/ Release Assessment and Scope Dependency(RASD) 2.0的新功能 查看 
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402 亮点前瞻：RASD2.0 查看
  • Release Assessment and Scope Dependency for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition(RASD): 2024 Edition 查看

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：销售话题
entry.content:
本篇文章重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，销售板块发布的新增功能，将覆盖以下主题内容：

  1. 显示更改日志-销售凭证
  2. 批量维护价格条件记录
  3. 优化开票凭证打印呈现
  4. 基于权限的价格访问-销售合同
  5. 灵活行项目决定增强
  6. 管理客户退货-版本2
  7. 管理贷项/借项凭证请求-版本2增强

1.显示更改日志-销售凭证

业务需求

企业销售经理经常需要跟踪和分析各种销售凭证的更改，例如销售报价、销售合同、销售订单和退货订单。过去他必须在各个销售凭证之间切换以访问其更改日志，这既耗时又容易出错，特别是在处理大量凭证时。

2408版本更新后APP：显示更改日志-销售凭证，现在可以在一个地方监控各种销售凭证的更改。该APP为每次更改提供了体验友好的描述，使销售经理更容易理解和分析数据。配备了复杂的过滤选项，可以根据合作伙伴功能、条件类型、字段名称和售达方等标准快速地优化搜索。

系统实现

APP:显示变更日志-销售凭证，每个销售凭证日志条目存有抬头、行项目和计划行更改的信息，并且对具体字段显示更改前后信息。

变更类型包括了，新增、更改和删除。

注意：当整张销售订单删除时，此APP将不能查询，因为后台表里已经彻底删除。

您可以导出到Excel来查看：

 

2.批量维护价格条件记录

业务需求

由于宏观市场通胀，客户需要根据一定的规律批量调整产品价格。

或者有部分产品价格即将到期，客户需要为其延长有效期。

系统实现

APP:管理价格-销售，首先先筛选出需要批量更改的条件，比如筛选条件类型，产品，销售组织等：

全选所有行项目，点击使用参考创建，您可以延长有效期；增加固定比例价格或者增加固定值价格。

注意：需要关注货币单位

 

3.优化开票凭证打印呈现

业务需求

客户只想打印开票凭证抬头信息，而一个开票凭证包含1000多个行项目，要呈现开票凭证的全部信息需要很长时间。

2408版本更新优化了开票凭证打印的数据检索，以减少在生成和预览开票打印期间的呈现时间。

系统实现

打开APP：维护表单模版，复制预交付模版来创建一个自定义表单模版

编辑并且勾选字段“优化数据服务”，然后下载模版

根据实际业务需求用Adobe LiveCycle Designer更改模版，比如移除一些节点，然后再上传

配置SSCUI:102313 分配表单模版（Assign Form Templates）新增：

APP：输出参数确定（Output Parameter Determination ），分配开票凭证自定义表单模版

现在可以在开票凭证中使用优化后的打印模版

 

4.基于权限的价格访问-销售合同

业务需求

基于不同角色对销售合同中访问价格条件类型的权限不同：

系统实现

配置SSCUI 106597：Enable Role-Based Access to Price Elements per SAP Object Type，选择销售合同

其他详细配置可参考：基于权限使用销售订单中的价格—2302云销售新功能前瞻 - SAP Community

 

5.灵活行项目决定增强

BLOG：SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402亮点前瞻：销售话题 - SAP Community

中内容销售订单项目类别灵活决定策略BRF+进行了详细介绍，2408版本增加了功能自定义字段

系统实现

 

6.管理客户退货-版本2

系统实现

管理客户退货-版本2，参考创建简化了版本1的创建体验

管理客户退货-版本2新增了Fiori版本无参考创建退货订单

除了在订单中点击保存和发布外，在管理退货列表中和退货订单详细中新增了Release按键，允许您发布一个退货订单以进行后续活动，例如：生成一个退货交货单。

新增刷新按钮，当发布后可以刷新获取最新的状态

对比版本1新增合作伙伴增加功能

对比版本1新增文本功能

支持9个后续活动：

  • 收货至工厂 (0001)
  • 立即移动至非限制可用库存 (0002)
  • 立即移动至废品 (0003)
  • 装运至供应商 (0005)
  • 直接装运至供应商 (0007)
  • 客户现场质检 (0008)
  • 产品留存在客户地点 (0013)
  • 立即转至指定库存 (0014)
  • 退回到客户 (0021)

2408版本新增功能：

  • 行项目退货总览
  • 更改行项目类别
  • 新增退货行项目参考创建

更多功能欢迎使用体验与咨询

 

7.管理贷项/借项凭证请求-版本2增强

  • 参考凭证创建请求行项目
  • 预览请求开票凭证打印
  • 支持手工创建贷项凭证请求，请求类型CMR4-基于项目的服务
  • 支持手工创建借项凭证请求，请求类型DRM4-基于项目的服务

 

感谢观看

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：EPPM话题
entry.content:
本篇文章重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，EPPM板块发布的新增功能，将覆盖以下主题内容：

  1. 管理项目需求-预留物料
  2. 使用API复制创建项目

1.管理项目需求-预留物料

业务需求

项目采购负责人可以从项目库存计划和预留物料

项目管理者与仓储人员通过预留凭证观察项目物料请求与发货数量

系统案例

APP：管理项目需求（Manage Project Demand）,对物料TG12创建项目预留10件，需求类型：项目库存，预留，保存后产生预留编号。

APP：管理项目需求可以监控刚刚创建的项目预留凭证122763，观察请求与发货数量等详细信息

当创建完预留后，观察此时物料TG12的库存情况，在仓库101A中总预留12件（其中2件非项目库存预留），项目库存10件

对预留凭证122763进行项目发货，移动类型221，发货7件

注意：此时必须有项目库存才能发货。

此时再观察物料TG12的项目库存与预留情况变化如下：

通过APP：管理项目需求，观察到预留请求与发货数量的变化。

2.使用API复制创建项目

功能介绍

现有的API：Enterprise Project增强了复制功能，允许参考现有项目复制创建新的项目，生成具有自动调整计划日期的项目结构，可选复制项目需求和结算规则。

 

感谢观看

entry.title: Two-Tier ERP with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Hello and Welcome! I am pleased to present the latest innovations in Two-Tier ERP with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release.

Here are the two innovations as part of this release in Two-Tier ERP:
    1. Greenhouse Gas Emissions Planning for Two-Tier ERP                                                                        2. Warranty Claim Process in Two-Tier ERP

Greenhouse Gas Emissions Planning for Two-Tier ERP 

Our First highlight is Greenhouse Gas Emissions Planning in Two-Tier ERP. 

 A Two-Tier ERP business scenario involves Tier-2 subsidiary company using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and Tier-1 headquarters using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. The headquarters needs to do group level planning for all subsidiary companies, including future carbon emissions planning and financial planning at transaction level.  This provides plan vs. actual comparison for variance analysis and regular course correction for strategic decision making.

 SAP has a solution for this scenario. Incorporating greenhouse gas emissions planning using Integrated Financial Planning with SAP Analytics Cloud for SAP S/4HANA presents opportunities for companies to evaluate the financial plan with carbon emission factors and calculate the future carbon footprints of the organization.

 The financial plan data serves as the foundation for calculating carbon dioxide equivalents (CO2e). The same plan structures, such as the quantity structures and allocation rules used for cost allocation, can also be reused to allocate CO2e to respective cost objects. The integrated financial planning model enables measuring the estimated impact of greenhouse gas emissions. Thus, pro-actively helping Two-Tier ERP customers make critical decisions related to the value chain across the group.

For more information refer to the blog post: Greenhouse Gas Emissions Planning for Two-Tier ERP

Warranty Claim Process for Two-Tier ERP

The second highlight is Warranty claim scenario in Two-Tier ERP. We have Tier-2, a subsidiary company running on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition primarily serves as a after sales service agency for an equipment sold to the customer from the headquarters as Tier-1 running on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. Here headquarters play a role of vendor for the service organization at the subsidiary.

 As part of after-sales service for an equipment under warranty, a customer warranty claim is registered. The system automatically validates claims based on the claim type and the applicable validity period. A corresponding vendor claim is created. customer claim and vendor claim are validated.

Vendor claim details are shared with the headquarters through replication of customer claim at headquarter for reimbursement to the service organization at subsidiary acting as the internal customer for the headquarters. Approved claim amounts are manually communicated to the subsidiary and is maintained through supplier responses in the Supplier Claim. Finally, the post-to-finance action for claims at both the tiers clears out account postings related to supplier and vendor claims.

For more information refer to the blog post: Warranty Claim process in Headquarter - Subsidiary Model for Two-Tier ERP

 Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts. 

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn and X. 

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series! 

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. You will find a 45-minute-long recording and a presentation for Two-Tier ERP/Early Release Series: Two-Tier ERP as well as 19 other topics of interest. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand–anywhere, anytime. 

🔎Find All of Our Assets 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Communication Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition via APIs
entry.content:
Introduction

With the release of the 2408 version of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, customers will now be able to create Communication Systems, Communication Users and Communication Arrangements via APIs. You can also read the existing Communication Scenarios via an API.

These are enabled via the Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0A48.

You can create a Communication Arrangement for the communication scenario SAP_COM_0A48 and then use the exposed APIs to perform communication management via those APIs.

Implementation

As an example, you can refer the screenshots attached below to understand how to use these APIs. I have used the API Communication Arrangements to create a communication arrangement.

  • The API is used to create a communication arrangement REMOTE_SCEN_109 for the communication scenario SAP_COM_0109 in an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system via Postman, using a POST request

  • The following JSON is passed as the body for the API request

 

 

{
    "CommunicationScenarioID": "SAP_COM_0109",
    "CommunicationSystemID": "YPD100",
    "Name": "REMOTE_SCEN_109",
    "Description": ""
}​

 

 

  • The communication arrangement REMOTE_SCEN_109 is created in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system upon executing the POST request from Postman

Conclusion

You can use the APIs Communication Systems, Communication Users to create communication users and communication systems similarly.

This means that these APIs can now be used to automate communication management from BTP and outside of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, based on custom automation requirements

Do follow the community page for SAP S/4HANA Cloud for more updates.

entry.title: Public Sector in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
The much-anticipated 2408 release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Public Sector is here.  This new release is again packed with new features, and groundbreaking UX and AI innovations. This release promises to elevate the user experience and harness the power of artificial intelligence, offering enhanced capabilities and efficiencies.  Check out my release highlights video.

Release Highlights SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Public Sector

The Public Sector Management (PSM) scope bundle including Grants Management, Budget Management, and Fund Accounting was previously released for the US, Canada, and Germany.  With 2408, the public sector functionality is now also available for the UK, the Netherlands, and Australia.  Our global rollout is just beginning to gather momentum, expect more countries to become available in 2025.  Check out the 2408 release in Process Navigator.

Process Navigator Public Sector US(requiring GASB)

Process Navigator Public Sector Global

 

In addition to continuing our global rollout of public sector functionality, other innovations and features continue to enhance the solution including:

  • Navigational assistance for Public Sector with the Joule co-pilot
  • Substitution tool for budget documents
  • Ability to consume the budget at due date or posting date
  • Checking budget availability using project hierarchies
  • Generation of budget documents for uploaded budget
  • New Budget and Payment Line Item Analyzer report

Navigational assistance with the Joule co-pilot

Features:

Express your business requirement in natural language and have the Joule copilot enable navigation to applications in budget management, grants management, and fund accounting, where you can execute your business processes.

Benefits:

  • Improve user satisfaction through the ability to express business requirements in natural language
  • Quickly and efficiently navigate to the ideal, relevant applications, with the help of Joule

 

Substitution Tool for Budget Documents

Features:

You now have the ability to automatically derive values (e.g., account assignments, budget type, and item description) when creating a budget document using the app Manage Budget Documents.

Benefits:

  • Better usability and faster end-user input
  • Improved data quality by pre-populating the right data

 

 

Ability to consume the budget for an expected expense (due date) instead of the posting date

Features:

  • Configure the behavior of the budget consumption date
  • Leverage this feature to use a due date (or expected expense date) as a budget consumption date; for instance, update purchase orders with a delivery date of next year to consume next year’s budget

Benefits:

  • Post commitments into future years even when the document is created today
  • Avoid consuming this year’s budget and prevent unnecessary carry forwards
  • Improve compliance in some countries where this is a legal requirement

Direct link to the Roadmap Explorer: road map item

 

Checking budget availability using project hierarchies

Features:

  • Increased flexibility to control project budget using both universal hierarchies and the project standard hierarchy
  • Use a universal hierarchy, the project standard hierarchy or both

Benefits:

  • You can now roll up budgets for certain projects within the project hierarchy and other projects using universal hierarchies
  • Capabilities to model a program structure above project hierarchies
  • Use project hierarchies without maintaining additional universal hierarchies

 

Budget updates for generating budget documents

Features:

Allows the generation of budget documents for uploaded budget, including documents from budget planning tools or Microsoft Excel.

Benefits:

Provides a consistent base of budget maintenance documents for uploaded and manually created budget documents.

 

 

Reporting on the budget versus payments and open invoices 

Features:

  • New Budget and Payment Line Item Analyzer report
  • Ability to compare budgets against payments and open invoices, as well as encumbrances and pre-encumbrances
  • Align budgetary reporting with financial and management reporting

Benefits:

Understand the impact on your budget at any stage in the financial process.

Direct link to the Roadmap Explorer: road map item

 

Additional New Features

  • SAC KPIs Improvements- Budget Availability by %
  •  Improve Budget Alert
  •  Status dependent/Grant Type dependent field group control
  •  Automatic Budget releases for Grants
  •  FBE - Revenue Increasing Budget Outstanding Improvements 2408
  •  Grants Reporting Due Dates/Actions/Events - Scheduling

For more information on what is coming into the next release for S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition,  please scroll through the SAP Roadmap Explorer.

Also look for updates to the Public Sector Learning Journeys coming soon.   You see updates for the latest release as well as additional digital content.  Public Sector Learning Journeys

 

Closing words:

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts.

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on Mary Ramsrud.

📽️ Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series!

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. You will find a 22 minute-long recording and a presentation for Public Sector as well as 19 other topics of interest. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand–anywhere, anytime.

🔎 Find All of Our Assets

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you here:

entry.title: 10 new items added to SAP Activate for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for 2408 release
entry.content:
In this blog post, we want to share the 10 highlights of the methodology content enhancements in SAP Activate for deployment of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition that were recently published for the 2408 release update. Note that you can find an approximately 5-minute video showing a demo of all these enhancements at the bottom of this post.

1. Initial Admin User/Technical Administrator

You will find a new task that covers the verification of the Initial Admin/Technical Administrator, including defining their role, outlining steps to identify the suitable candidate, introducing a new user onboarding token process, guiding on creating and using SAP Universal IDs and managing cloud notification subscriptions on behalf of others. You can access the here - Verify Initial Admin/Technical Administrator. See more details about the task in the image below.

2. New Bundled Provisioning Process

A new task has been created to streamline the process of requesting initial system access for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and related systems, including SAP Cloud ALM tenant, SAP Central Business Configuration tenant, and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Starter System. Requests are managed through SAP for Me, initiated by the initial Admin User, who subsequently receives access instructions via email. Bundled Provisioning allows partners and customers to request access to multiple system tenants in a single request for enhanced efficiency. You can access the task here - Request Initial System Access of SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

3. Grant Access to Partner for Creating and Managing Cases

A new SAP Activate task explains granting SAP implementation partners access to create and manage cases for customers on their behalf. The procedure, detailed in SAP Note 2518600, outlines steps to follow using SAP for Me, enabling authorization for service partners (S-users) to provide support services. You can access the task here Grant Access to Partner for Creating and Managing Cases.

4. Data Migration Updates

The recent updates emphasize the importance of downtime and restriction windows in data migration, ensuring minimal business disruption. A new accelerator, Software Lifecycle Management, was added to support data migration tasks in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition development environment. Additionally, the Hotfix Collection Deployment Restrictions.pdf accelerator was introduced for the SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit task, offering guidance on deploying hotfixes. Additional content updates were made to enhance support for data migration via direct transfer, and general procedure updates improved readability and usability, aiming to streamline the migration process and enhance user comprehension. You can find the updated content in the following tasks:

  • Execute Data Migration in the Development Tenant of SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • Self-Enable on SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit
  • Execute Data Migration in the Development Tenant of SAP S/4HANA Cloud

5. Organizational Change Management (OCM) with SAP Activate

A comprehensive review of the Organizational Change Management (OCM) content included new and rework of many deliverables, tasks and accelerators. In addition, a new Organizational Change Management tag has been created that includes 7 accelerators in Discover phase attached to task Organizational Change Management Overview; 12 accelerators in Prepare phase assigned to following tasks:

  • Change Concept
  • Change Plan
  • Stakeholder Analysis
  • Communication Analysis and Plan

an accelerator in Explore phase assigned to task Communication Plan Execution; 4 accelerators in the Realize phase assigned to the task Detailed Change Impact Analysis. 
Additionally, you can find a standalone comprehensive methodology roadmap for Organizational Change Management in SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer.

6. Lifecycle Events and Hotfix Collection

The SAP Activate methodology updates for lifecycle events include adding tasks to the Release and Update Cycle deliverable, covering three key lifecycle events: Review and Process Hotfix Collection, Evaluate and Activate Feature from Continuous Delivery, and Prepare and Process Upgrade. These tasks streamline lifecycle management, and the SAP Activate for Upgrade of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (3-system landscape) roadmap is now linked to the Prepare and Process Upgrade task, offering a structured guide for handling upgrades in a 3-system landscape.

The Review and Process Hotfix Collection task was updated to include references to several key accelerators: Software Lifecycle Management for Customers, Upgrade & Maintenance Schedule, and Hotfix Collection Deployment Restrictions. These updates provide users with comprehensive guidance on managing hotfix collections effectively. You can access them on the following tasks:

  • Software Lifecycle Management for Customers
  • Upgrade & Maintenance Schedule
  • Hotfix Collection Deployment Restrictions

 

7. Parallel Project Line

The enhancements for customers in the early adopter program for parallel project lines allow for a clear separation of incremental configuration activities from the “main line,” enabling the productive environment to remain up-to-date with the latest software releases. After validation, new configurations can be merged back into the main line and transported to the productive environment. These enhancements also include features for managing development and test environments, copying master data for data migration testing, and copying automated testing scripts. You can access this content in a dedicated SAP Activate methodology for parallel project lines early adopters here. If you want to see only the tasks that have been adjusted for this new functionality, access Parallel Project Line tag to display these tasks.

8. SAP Activate Methodology for SAP Business Technology Platform

The SAP Activate Methodology for SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) provides implementation guidelines for customers deploying BTP-based solutions. It includes phases, deliverables, and tasks following the SAP Activate framework, with accelerators linked to relevant tasks for easy access. Deliverables and tasks are listed sequentially, though some may need to be parallelized for efficiency. This roadmap will be rolled out in phases, starting with a focus on governance and key implementation milestones, and later expanding to specialized areas like App Development, Automation, Integration, Data & Analytics, and AI.

9. SAP Activate for Conversion of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2-system to 3-system landscape

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition roadmap for converting from a 2-system to a 3-system landscape has been updated with insights from customer conversions using both CBC and Solution Builder-based systems. Key updates include setting up transport management for business continuity, revised self-enablement activities, and the addition of a new accelerator highlighting delta features for the landscape conversion. A Customer Conversion Checklist accelerator and a new SAP Community accelerator for the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Three-System Landscape, have also been introduced to support the conversion process.

10. Find Roadmap Viewer from Google and Bing Searches and access it from SAP for Me

Watch the video below to see how to access SAP Activate methodology content from your SAP for Me screen. It adds to the searching for the SAP Activate content on traditional search engines like Google Search or Microsoft Bing.

You can view the demo of there 10 enhancements in the video following this link - https://sapvideo.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/?entry_id=1_djrp3uui

 

Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series!

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Did you miss the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand–anywhere, anytime.

entry.title: SAP ERP公有云 [SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition] 2408 亮点前瞻
entry.content:
随着全球数字化转型的持续推进，企业资源规划（ERP）解决方案也不断演进，以满足日益复杂的商业需求。我们很高兴地宣布，SAP最新版本的公有云ERP解决方案—— SAP ERP公有云2408，已经准备就绪。这一版本代表着SAP在技术创新和业务优化领域的最新成果，为企业在数字化变革中提供了更智能、更高效和更灵活的工具。Cloud ERP PSCC的负责人Bert Schulze也发布了2408的英文博客：SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Release的亮点。

2408版本通过一系列创新功能和强化改进，持续提升用户体验并优化业务流程。让我们深入了解一下这次更新中的主要亮点。

本次更新涵盖了SAP Cloud ERP PSCC团队总结的亮点，这些成果将进一步增强SAP ERP公有云的功能性和适用性。以下是本版本的一些关键改进和新增功能的简要概述：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：人工智能与技术创新（AI and Technologies）

人工智能与技术创新在优化业务流程，改进决策支持，提高用户体验方面发挥着关键作用。在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，人工智能和技术创新将带来众多令人期待的亮点功能，用于提升企业运营效率，改变企业应对复杂商业挑战的方式。

本次分享将带来以下内容：

  • SAP Joule in S/4HANA Cloud
  • 用户体验-我的主页
  • 从订单到收款（Order to Cash）的端到端智能流程自动化功能
  • ISLM中全新的一键开启（Turnkey）功能
  • ISLM中支持的新框架-生成式 AI （Generative AI)
  • 情况管理的新用例31N
  • 使用自定义对象创建情况对象
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408中开放Beta功能测试的AI应用（链接）

更多详情可以参考链接

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD)

在本篇博客中，将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 当中RASD版块更新的内容，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 已使用对象
  • 后继Companion
  • CDS Comparator

更多详情可以参考链接。

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：供应链管理和质量管理

在SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，供应链管理板块从库存管理、库存盘点、订单承诺，质量管理从FMEA、缺陷管理、质量通知几大内容进行功能更新，具体可查看Blog：SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：供应链管理和质量管理。

库存管理 – 管理库存盘点应用

在2408版本中，管理库存盘点应用盘点计数现已支持下载-上载选项，即为盘点计数下载/上载excel，更方便的对盘点计数进行结果录入，且下载的excel会基于盘点凭证中的条目和物料进行对应显示。如使用第三方仓库的客户可以轻松地为其仓库工作人员提供打印输出，完成纸质库存盘点流程后，可将结果以 Excel 文件形式上载回系统，面对盘点计数数据量大的情况可以更方便快捷的进行系统操作。

库存管理 – 库存类型

2408库存管理板块的库存转储应用现支持多种库存类型以及不同的特殊库存类型，详见下方图表，蓝色部分是2408版本库存管理应用新增支持的库存类型和特殊库存类型。

质量管理-高级变式配置和质量管理的集成

在2408版本中，高级变式配置（advanced variant configuration）现已和质量管理板块有集成了，可以按配置激活质量检验。具体为质量检验中的高级变式配置 (AVC) 与检验批次的集成，可将销售订单或采购订单配置中指定的特征传输到检验批次的检验特征，通过简化流程，提高使用 AVC 和质量管理的客户的整体效率。

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：制造

在SAP 公有云2408版本发布之际，制造板块从生产工程、生产计划、生产执行都迎来了一些新的变化，覆盖了可扩展性、用户体验、新功能等重大更新。

监控物料覆盖：

当您对物料运行MRP计划后，系统对于MRP元素有些建议操作，以确保按计划覆盖需求。这些建议是以附加列的形式在“监控物料覆盖范围 - 净细分”和“监控物料覆盖范围 - 净值和单个细分”应用中显示，其中包括重新计划建议的数量。在以往的版本中，该列信息是需要在激活新功能的配置应用中激活后才能显示，从2408版本开始，无需激活即可使用该功能了。

更多精彩内容，请访问制造Blog：

生产工程和生产工序：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：制造（生产工程... - SAP Community

生产计划：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：制造（生产计划... - SAP Community

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：寻源和采购管理

2408版本比较大的变动是产品寻源相关的项目范围已弃用，但是也列出了很多新功能。当新版本发布之后，激活相关配置则可以实现采购合同的版本管理。当更改并发布已批准或已拒绝采购合同的版本相关字段时，将自动创建新版本。

您现在还可以通过采购申请项目创建具有自定义凭证类型的采购订单。

更多详细内容可以参考博客SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：寻源和采购话题 - SAP Community

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：销售

本篇文章重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，销售板块发布的新增功能，将覆盖以下主题内容

  • 显示更改日志-销售凭证
  • 批量维护价格条件记录
  • 优化开票凭证打印呈现
  • 基于权限的价格访问-销售合同
  • 灵活行项目决定增强
  • 管理客户退货-版本2
  • 管理贷项/借项凭证请求-版本2增强

显示更改日志-销售凭证

企业销售经理经常需要跟踪和分析各种销售凭证的更改，例如销售报价、销售合同、销售订单和退货订单。过去他必须在各个销售凭证之间切换以访问其更改日志，这既耗时又容易出错，特别是在处理大量凭证时。

2408版本更新后APP：显示更改日志-销售凭证，现在可以在一个地方监控各种销售凭证的更改。该APP为每次更改提供了用户体验友好的描述，使销售经理更容易理解和分析数据。配备了复杂的过滤选项，可以根据合作伙伴功能、条件类型、字段名称和售达方等标准快速地优化搜索。

 

批量维护价格条件记录

由于宏观市场通胀，客户需要根据一定的规律批量调整产品价格。

或者有部分产品价格即将到期，客户需要为其延长有效期。

更多详细内容可以参考博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：销售话题 - SAP Community

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：财务

本篇文章重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，财务板块发布的新增功能，将覆盖以下主题内容

  • “过账资产重估”应用       
  • 数据修复工具           
  • 含业务交易类型的新自动调整过账场景   
  • 切换到管理日记账分录（新版本）           
  • 管理运营总账科目   
  • 即将发生的从快速启动板中搜索日记账分录的更改
  • 在财务会计里打印客户发票           
  • 成本中心审核手册               
  • 在“管理过账期间”应用中显示变更日志           
  • 删除自动科目确定中的内容           
  • 余额验证中的 QTD 度量    
  • 实际成本的CDS View发布           

！！！过账资产重估”应用 （Post Asset Revaluation）

使用新的“过账资产重估”应用 (F7775)，您可以手动过账重估。新的重估应用使您能够使用重置价值（即与购置和生产成本不同）重估资产。例如，您可以执行重估以将市场价值原则应用于资产会计。新应用将替换之前的应用“过账资产重估” (ABAWL) 。之前的应用已弃用。之前的 ABAWL 应用使用资产交易类型。交易类型确定如何重估资产，例如，891 “上一年度重估（向下）”、897 “当前年度重估（向下）”。在进一步处理期间必须记住这些内容。但是，在新应用中，您可以在过账之前直接指定相应的参数。因此，无法再使用不同的交易类型区分不同的重估。而是使用新的业务交易类型概念。

新应用提供了与“管理固定资产”应用的更好集成：“在管理固定资产”应用中，您可以选择资产并跳转到新的重估应用。重估过账后，您可以导航回“管理固定资产”应用并检查资产值。

新应用在以下业务目录中可用：

业务目录，名称

业务目录，技术名称

“资产会计 - 资产重估”

SAP_FIN_BC_AA_REVAL_PC

更多详细内容可以参考博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻: 财务话题

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：用户体验

从2408版本开始，空间和页面（Spaces and Pages）将正式成为全新的UI界面展示方式，旧的分组（Group）模式将退出历史舞台。

更多详细内容可参考以下博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：用户体验（User Experience）

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：技术话题

在之前的版本中，我们会在不同的文档链接中发布那些已更改、已删除、已弃用或新的扩展对象，比如CDS视图、API、业务对象接口等等。

现在，我们将在一个统一的链接里公布所有的扩展对象的更新，你可以使用不同的过滤器查看你感兴趣的更新。

该链接会始终打开最新版本的内容https://help.sap.com/S4_CE_CHANGES_EXT_OBJ

更多详细内容可参考以下博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：技术话题（Technology Cross Topics）

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：EPPM

管理项目需求-预留物料

项目采购负责人可以从项目库存计划和预留物料

项目管理者与仓储人员通过预留凭证观察项目物料请求与发货数量

使用API复制创建项目

现有的API：Enterprise Project增强了复制功能，允许参考现有项目复制创建新的项目，生成具有自动调整计划日期的项目结构，可选复制项目需求和结算规则。

更多详细内容可参考以下博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：EPPM话题 - SAP Community

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：可拓展性

在本篇博客中，将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 当中可拓展性部分的亮点更新内容。将会覆盖以下话题内容：

可拓展性概览，如何为业务需求选择可拓展性？

拓展字段向导，使用开发人员可拓展性更快捷地创建拓展字段

  • 大批量交付，使用一次性交付进行ABAP开发

更多详细内容可参考以下博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：可拓展性 - SAP Community

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：自动化测试工具

SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 当中自动化测试工具版块发布的功能，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 客制化API测试
  • ABAP Units 仪表盘
  • 其他重要增强

更多详情可以参考链接。

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：分析报表

在本篇博客中，将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 当中分析报表版块发布的功能，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 嵌入式 SAC 故事：优化设计体验
  • 自定义分析查询和服务
  • 新审核手册功能：评论、计算、财务业务洞察等

更多详情可以参考链接。
